item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 22min We often talk about the greatest underdog stories in sports. Buster Douglas over Tyson.
item.description: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 22min We often talk about the greatest underdog stories in sports. Buster Douglas over Tyson. Greece winning the Euros. Miracle on Ice. Leicester's EPL win. But @joeyknish22 going from this DM in 2019 to having a semi pro betting career might top them all. An inspiration to us all. 1 1 23 2 mil

Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 25min 2026 NFL Draft needs (via @TheNickShook ): The one goal each AFC team must accomplish
https:// nfl.com/news/2026-nfl- draft-needs-the-one-goal-each-afc-team-must-nail … 1 5 mil

item.title: wyche89: Around The NFL reposteó Steve Wyche @wyche89 · 35min Oh noooo. Coach Mac…RIP brother. Oh man. This hits hard. Condolenc
item.description: Around The NFL reposteó Steve Wyche @wyche89 · 35min Oh noooo. Coach Mac…RIP brother. Oh man. This hits hard. Condolences to his family . Cita Tennessee Titans @Titans · 1h We extend our deepest condolences to the family of Dave “Coach Mac” McGinnis, who passed away Monday afternoon in Nashville with family at his side. 2 28 15 mil

item.title:
Pinnacle: Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 40min Real Madrid: still live in the second leg this week vs. Bayern Munich
@GarethWheeler sti
item.description:
Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 40min Real Madrid: still live in the second leg this week vs. Bayern Munich
@GarethWheeler still has faith on Pinnacle FC.
